Navigation.jciDesc: We coordinate premium treatments through JCI-accredited partner hospitals in Istanbul, Turkey. All procedures include VIP transfers, 5-star Bosphorus accommodation, and dedicated concierge support with a transparent no-hidden-fees policy.

Hero.title: Welcome to Meva Clinic
Hero.subtitle: Premium International Patient Care in Istanbul
Hero.headline: Meva Clinic Istanbul –
Hero.headlineSuffix: for Bariatric, Hair, Dental & Aesthetic Treatments.
Hero.subtext: Personalized treatment programs in Istanbul and Cyprus for bariatric, hair, dental, aesthetic and fertility patients — supported by specialist doctors, accredited partner hospitals and multilingual VIP patient services.
Hero.successMsg: Thank you! Our medical team will contact you shortly on WhatsApp.

Stats.heading: Authority in Numbers
Stats.subtext: International patient volume and service metrics across Meva Clinic’s specialist treatment programs.

Footer.partnerDesc: Our strategic partnerships guarantee VIP access from landing to the procedures within our premium clinical network and 5-star hotels.

Safety.heading: Patient Safety Comes First.
Safety.subtext: Meva Clinic supports international patient journeys through specialist doctors and accredited partner hospitals in Turkey, with treatment planning, patient documentation and follow-up guidance designed around safety.
Safety.erdemBio: Over 15 years of experience in complex Gastric Sleeve and Bypass surgeries. Titular member of IFSO Europe.
Safety.turanBio: Hollywood Smile, implantology and 3D reconstruction aesthetics expert. 8000+ implants successfully completed.
